awards: Nominated for 2 Oscars. 16 wins & 24 nominations total
actors: Bill Paxton, Billy Bob Thornton, Bridget Fonda
plot: Three diverse characters, for the most part intellectually challenged, find a deserted plane with a bag full of millions of dollars inside. They devise a simple plan to keep the money if no-one claims it. Ofcourse, nothing turns out simple...
country: United Kingdom, France, Germany, Japan, United States
